title: Innovent Biologics shares rise 10% after pact with Pfizer of up to $10.5 billion
summary_full: Innovent Biologics rose as much as 10%, after entering a strategic global licensing and collaboration agreement with Pfizer to develop oncology medicines.
summary_public: Innovent Biologics rose as much as 10%, after entering a strategic global licensing and collaboration agreement with Pfizer to develop oncology medicines.
